name: Eggplant Skillet Supper
recipeIngredient: 1 can diced tomatoes, without the juice
1 4.5-oz. can mushroom stems and pieces, drained
1 teaspoon herb seasoning blend of choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a large skillet; remove the meat to drain and set aside.
2. In the pan drippings, sauté onion, garlic, and eggplant over medium-high heat.
3. Return the meat to the pan and add tomatoes (with can juice) and mushrooms; stir to combine.
4. Add all seasonings, blending them in.
5. Bring to a boil; add rice.
6. Reduce heat; simmer for 20 minutes or until rice is tender and excess liquid is absorbed.
7. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese.
